title: nassella tenuiculmis
intro: Nassella tenuiculmis, also known as Indian grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America, particularly in the southwestern region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nassella tenuiculmis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Nassella tenuiculmis can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in poultices and salves to apply topically for wound healing and skin conditions.
